metadata.description: Analyst-curated behavior alias resolver for mapping threat-report phrases to candidate MITRE ATT&CK techniques.

encoded powershell.note: May indicate PowerShell execution and command obfuscation.

payload download.note: Common behavior phrase for transferring a payload into the environment.

credential dump.note: Maps to OS Credential Dumping when the report describes dumping OS credentials.

lsass dump.note: LSASS access or dumping is commonly associated with OS Credential Dumping.

wmi execution.note: Use of WMI or WMIC for command execution.
